properties.Test Case: Verify that Source Bubbles are not hidden when Talking Book Tool is open.
properties.Steps: Verify that Source Bubbles are not hidden when Talking Book Tool is open.

properties.Test Case: Download one of the Look, Listen, and Live books which has long stretches of audio. In Edit, play the audio, then stop the audio. Then resume the audio. Add additional segment markders (|) to cut up the text, using both the keyboard and the Advanced:"Insert Segment Marker". Run Adjust Timings again. Click Play. It should start from the beginning. It should highlight according to your segment markers. (JT: when we fix BL-15678, we should note expectations here regarding previous adjustments to other segments. Will this reset all segments to their default positions, or keep any manual adjustments the user made to pre-existing breaks?)
properties.Steps: Download one of the Look, Listen, and Live books which has long stretches of audio. In Edit, play the audio, then stop the audio. Then resume the audio.
